creator: andy@icc.surw.chel.su
text:
This is a patch to update games/KnightCap port.


diff -Nru KnightCap/patches/patch-ac KnightCap-3.5/patches/patch-ac
--- KnightCap/patches/patch-ac	Thu Jan  1 00:00:00 1970
+++ KnightCap-3.5/patches/patch-ac	Mon Aug  3 12:57:31 1998
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+--- knightcap.h	Wed Mar 11 21:51:58 1998
++++ /home/andy/tmp/wrk/knightcap.h	Mon Aug  3 12:56:45 1998
+@@ -27,7 +27,7 @@
+ #define NO_STALEMATE_LEARN 1 
+ 
+ #define STORE_ONLY_NEGATIVE 0
+-#define USE_APPLET 1
++#define USE_APPLET 0
+ 
+ #define __COEFFS_PER_STAGE__ (__TOTAL_COEFFS__/(MATING+1))
+ #define USE_HASH_TABLES 1

Fix: 

Please, check and apply this patch.
